info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ayam akarmakaH sakarmakaH ca' iti mA.DA.vfttiH  ' tfpa prIRane ityeke ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  devopi svAdizu pAWam anumene   vfttikAranyAsAdayaH etam pAWam na icCanti  vistarastu kfdantarUpamAlAyAM drazwavyaH  ' fDnotIti Baved vfdDAvfDyatItyatra tu Syani ' (Slo. 122) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samidDahomena hyeva samfdDA AhutayaH' (Sa॰brA॰1.5.3.7) samfdDA sampannAH samyaNniruptA nirUQA (Bavanti)
'devAn kuryuradevAMSca kaH kziRvaMstAn (brAhmaRAn) samfDnuyAt' (manu॰9.315) samfdDiM prApnuyAdityAha
'yaM kAmayetANgErenaM vyarDayAnIti' (E0 brA0 33) vyfdDirviyoga iti govindasvAmI
'indrasyAnu vyfdDiM kzatraM somapITena vyArDyata' (Sa0 brA0 1246 E0 brA0 728) vyArDyata=vyayujyata
'mA vaniM mA vAcaM no vIrtsIH' (aTarva0 576) vyfdDAM mA cikIrzIrityAha
'tadAhuH vyfdDaM vA etad yajYasya' ( ) fdDihInamityarTaH viSabdo'BAve
'tasmAdetat kzatriya eva nakzatramupertset' (Sa0 brA0 21217) asminneva nakzatre (citrAyAm)'gnyADAnamicCennirvartayitumityAha upapUrvAdfDeH sannantAlliNi rUpam iqaBAvapakze
